channel.title: Invests on Geeky Investor
channel.description: Recent content in Invests on Geeky Investor

item.title: My Investing strategy
item.description: Current status retrospective previous strategy My stategy for TFSA/RRSP Estimate how much it will be if I keep using the strategy My final result of future pension income estimate Current Status In January 2022, my portfolio in investment account finally reached $300K. It’s an important milestone in my journey to financial independence. I can still remember the moment I opened my TD waterhouse account in 2015. I have grown a lot from a investing newbie to a comfortable investor.
